nodes.x: AND now, behold, I would speak somewhat unto the remnant of this people who are spared, if it so be that God may give unto them my words, that they may know of the things of their fathers; yea, I…
Know ye that ye are of the house of Israel.
"because [that] ye are of the house of Israel" (2 Nephi 6:5)
4 For thus saith the Lord unto the house of. Israel, Seek ye me, and ye shall live; ;

And now, the words which I shall read are they which Isaiah spake concerning all the house of Israel; wherefore, they may be likened unto you, for ye are of the house of Israel. And there are many things which have been spoken by Isaiah which may be likened unto you, because ye are of the house of Israel. (2 Nephi 6:5.)
Know ye that ye must come unto repentance, or ye cannot be saved.
3 1 *Hearken, ye children, to the judgement of your father*, L κα And do thereafter, that ye may be saved”.
Know ye that ye must lay down your weapons of war, and delight no more in the shedding of blood, and take them not again, save it be that God shall command you.

They buried the weapons of war, for peace] This inspired covenant of the Anti-Nephi-Lehies to bury their weapons and never again shed man's blood with them was rewarded with great blessings, notwithstanding, as we shall read, one thousand and five of their number were later slain by the Lamanites. Said Jesus to the unseeing: "For had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed me: for he wrote of me. "But if ye believe not his writings, how shall ye believe my words?" (John 5:46-47). Those who understood and believed not that which Moses wrote did not, in effect, believe this which Jesus spoke. This episode underscores the important words of Mormon about the relationship of the biblical…
25 Wherefore, if ye believe me, ye will labor while it is called today.
